channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Instant analysis of 49ers’ wild 36-24 win over Seattle Seahawks
item.description: The 49ers, after losing three of their past four, outlasted the Seattle Seahawks 36-24 on Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: Cam Inman, The Mercury News

item.title: Fry's 2-run homer, squeeze bunt lead Guardians over Tigers 5-4 and force ALDS Game 5
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — Pinch-hitter David Fry had a go-ahead, two-run homer in the seventh inning, then bunted home an insurance run in the ninth to help the Cleveland Guardians force a decisive Game 5 against the Detroit Tigers in their AL Division Series with a 5-4 victory on Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: LARRY LAGE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Gerrit Cole tosses playoff gem, shutting down Royals and sending Yankees back to ALCS with 3-1 win
item.description: Gerrit Cole held the Kansas City Royals to a single run over seven innings Thursday night, sending the New York Yankees to a 3-1 victory that put them back to the American League Championship Series.
item.dc:creator: Dave Skretta, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Padres vs. Dodgers: How to watch decisive Game 5 of NLDS
item.description: With the National League Division Series between the San Diego Padres and Los Angeles Dodgers tied at 2-2, it's win or go home for the Friars as they head up north for a decisive Game 5.
item.dc:creator: Domenick Candelieri, Fox 5

item.title: Benches briefly empty as tensions boil over between Yankees, Royals in their AL Division Series
item.description: Benches briefly emptied in Game 4 of the AL Division Series between the Yankees and Royals after New York shortstop Anthony Volpe delivered a hard tag on Michael Garcia to complete a double play in the sixth inning Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Adam Svensson has personal-best 60 to lead in Utah's return to PGA Tour after 61 years
item.description: Adam Svensson has welcomed Utah back to the PGA Tour schedule with the lowest round of the Canadian's career on the tour.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Report: Cam Rising to start tomorrow at Arizona State
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It looks like Cam Rising is ready to return to the field. According to a report by ActionNetwork's Brett McMurphy, Rising will start at quarterback for the #16 Utah football team tomorrow night at Arizona State.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Minnesota Lynx stun New York Liberty with 95-93 overtime win in Game 1 of the WNBA Finals
item.description: Napheesa Collier’s turnaround jumper with 8.8 seconds left lifted the Minnesota Lynx to a 95-93 win over the New York Liberty in Game 1 of the WNBA Finals.
item.dc:creator: Doug Feinberg, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Steelers WR George Pickens says he was unaware about NFL rules banning messages on eye black
item.description: PITTSBURGH (AP) — Pittsburgh Steelers wide receiver George Pickens said he was unaware of the NFL rule prohibiting players from writing messages on their eye black during games. Pickens wrote a message that included an expletive during Pittsburgh's 20-17 loss to Dallas on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: WILL GRAVES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Phillies end 3rd straight October without World Series championship
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Carlos Estévez crouched on the mound and turned his head toward center field as the Phillies reliever tracked the flight of Francisco Lindor’s long drive into the outfield.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jets offensive coordinator Nathaniel Hackett stripped of play calling duties as shake-up continues
item.description: Jeff Ulbrich, interim head coach of the New York Jets, announced Thursday that offensive coordinator Nathaniel Hackett will no long be responsible for play calling duties.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bill Belichick talks Jets' decision to fire Robert Saleh
item.description: Former New England Patriots head coach Bill Belichick weighed in on the New York Jets' decision to fire Robert Saleh five games into the season.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Tom Brady donates $100,000 toward hurricane relief in Florida
item.description: NFL legend Tom Brady donated $100,000 toward hurricane relief in Florida after Hurricanes Milton and Helene devastated parts of the state.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Giancarlo Stanton hits go-ahead homer in the eighth, Yankees beat Royals 3-2 in Game 3 of the ALDS
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Giancarlo Stanton hit a go-ahead homer in the eighth inning amid a battle of bullpens, and the New York Yankees beat the Kansas City Royals 3-2 on Wednesday night in Game 3 of their AL Division Series at Kauffman Stadium.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Mets win, advance to NLCS for the first time since 2015
item.description: NEW YORK — Francisco Lindor hit a grand slam in the sixth inning, his latest clutch swing in an extraordinary season full of them, and the New York Mets reached the National League Championship Series with a 4-1 victory over the Philadelphia Phillies on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Utah Hockey Club celebrates opening game with evening-long Delta Center plaza party
item.description: Just 172 days after it was announced Utah would be joining the National Hockey League, the Utah Hockey Club is set to play its first game in its inaugural season.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: Where to watch Padres vs. Dodgers NLDS Game 3
item.description: The San Diego Padres and the Los Angeles Dodgers will meet again in Game 3 of the best-of-five National League Division Series Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: San Diego Padres urge fans to 'stay classy'
item.description: San Diego Padres management is asking fans to demonstrate good behavior as the contentious National League Division Series shifts from Dodger Stadium to Petco Park on Tuesday, tied at one game apiece.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, KTLA 5

item.title: LeBron and son Bronny James play together for the first time in a preseason game for the Lakers
item.description: PALM DESERT, Calif. (AP) — LeBron James grew up without a father, and the top scorer in NBA history has often said he savors every moment and milestone he can experience with his own three children.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Baseball fans discuss Dodgers’ chances in NLDS Game 2 over donuts
item.description: After a rollercoaster of emotions in Game 1 of the National League Divisional Series, baseball lovers were up early getting donuts in Inglewood and eager to share their thoughts with the news on Sunday's matchup between the Los Angeles Dodgers and the San Diego Padres.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: Bears vs. Panthers: What to know for Sunday's Week 5 matchup at Soldier Field
item.description: Carolina (1-3) at Chicago (2-2) Sunday, Noon, Fox UPDATE: The Bears announced their list of inactives, via their X feed. They are WR Velus Jones Jr., FB Khari Blasingame, DL Zacch Pickens, DB Terrell Smith and DL Dominique Robinson.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Mets use another October rally to score 5 runs in 8th and top Phillies 6-2 in Game 1 of NLDS
item.description: Mark Vientos and Brandon Nimmo keyed another late New York comeback, helping the Mets break through for five runs in the eighth inning against a pair of All-Star relievers as they rallied past the Philadelphia Phillies 6-2 on Saturday in Game 1 of their National League Division Series.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bowles says the Buccaneers will learn from their mistakes in overtime loss to division-rival Falcons
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers have no one to blame but themselves for failing to take advantage of an opportunity to tighten their grip on first place in the NFC South.
item.dc:creator: FRED GOODALL, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Viral disease outbreak leads to several horses being euthanized at Los Alamitos
item.description: An outbreak of a potentially fatal viral disease at Los Alamitos Race Course has led to seven race horses being euthanized, officials have confirmed. Announced in an advisory on Thursday, the California Horse Racing Board said it was notified of an outbreak of Equine Infectious Anemia on Sept.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5
